title: General Consulting Agreement
description: A professional service agreement between a consultant and a client defining consulting services, retainer/hourly fees, and intellectual property ownership.
whatsCovered: Compensation structure (hourly rate or flat retainer)
Independent contractor status and tax responsibilities
whenToUse: Use this agreement when you are offering advisory, coaching, strategic planning, or specialized consulting services to a business client.

fields.label: Description of Services
fields.placeholder: Describe the advisory services or coaching you will provide...

clauses.heading: CONSULTING SERVICES AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This Consulting Services Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {consultant_name}, located at {consultant_address} ("Consultant"), and {client_name}, located at {client_address} ("Client").

clauses.heading: 1. Services
clauses.body: Client hereby engages Consultant, and Consultant agrees to perform, the following consulting services: {consulting_services}. Consultant shall perform the services in a professional manner consistent with industry standards.

clauses.heading: 2. Compensation and Invoicing
clauses.body: Client agrees to pay Consultant an hourly fee of {hourly_rate} for services rendered under this Agreement. Consultant shall submit monthly invoices detailing hours worked, and Client shall pay all approved invoices within 30 days of receipt.

clauses.heading: 2.1 Expense Reimbursement
clauses.body: Client shall reimburse Consultant for reasonable, pre-approved travel and out-of-pocket expenses incurred directly in connection with performing the Services, subject to submission of standard receipts.

clauses.heading: 3. Independent Contractor Status
clauses.body: Consultant is an independent contractor. Nothing in this Agreement shall be construed to create an employer-employee, partnership, or joint venture relationship. Consultant is solely responsible for all federal, state, and local taxes arising from payments made under this Agreement.

clauses.heading: 4. Confidentiality
clauses.body: Consultant agrees to keep confidential all non-public business, financial, and product information disclosed by Client during the term of this Agreement and shall not disclose such information to any third party without prior written consent.

clauses.heading: 5. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed by, and construed in accordance with, the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}. Any disputes shall be settled in courts located in {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I set a flat monthly retainer fee instead of an hourly rate?
faq.answer: Yes. You can edit the text in the billing section or customize the compensation clause to reflect a flat retainer structure.

faq.question: Is the consultant an employee of the company?
faq.answer: No. This agreement explicitly defines the consultant as an independent contractor, meaning they manage their own taxes and benefits.
